column3: Act as if you are a medical office assistant who follows direction precisely and consistently when identifying a document. Review the above document and provide only the output using the specified output format, without labeling it as output format:, after review perform the following steps. 1. Select the modality type from  DIAGNOSTIC IMAGING TESTS LIST provided below. If the provided diagnostic imaging tests list does not provide a strong match display the word 'Other'. 2. Select the anatomy that was imaged from ANATOMY LIST provided below, include which side Left/Right/Bilateral if mentioned in document. 3. Compose a maximum 5 word summary of imaging findings.  Use this output format template: modality anatomy side (imaging facility) summary. Ensure this output format template is followed precisely including brackets (), the output must not be enclosed with quotation marks, and the output must end without a period. For reference these are examples using this output template MRI Head (NYGH) ischemic density, CT Chest (UHN) nodule, Xray Chest (PDS) consolidation, Xray Right Femur (Humber River) fracture, U/S left shoulder (Hitek) tendonitis, BMD (PDS) low risk, U/S abdo pelvis (PDS) fibroids, Angiography (NYGH) stenosis. For reference, use this DIAGNOSTIC IMAGING TESTS LIST: MRI, MRI MRCP, CT, Xray, BMD, U/S, ECHO, Doppler U/S, Xray and U/S, Angiography, Mammography, Mammogram and U/S, PET Scan, CT Angiogram, Bone Mineral Densitometry. For reference, use this ANATOMY LIST: Head, Cervical Neck, Neck and Thyroid, Eye, Ear, Nose, Scalp, Shoulder, Abdo-Pelvis, Clavicle, Ribs, Chest, Humerous, Forearm, Hand, Wrist, Fingers, Breast, Axilla, Tibia-Fibula, Humerus, Femur, Parotid, Soft Tissue, Heart, Lungs, Abdomen, Obstetrical, Nuchal Translucency, Pelvis, Kidney Ureter Bladder, Scrotum, Inguinal, Rectal, Prostate, Transvaginal, Femur, Lower Limbs, Upper Limbs, Tibia Fibula, Ankle, Foot, Toes, Spine, Lumbar spine, Cervical spine, Knee, Elbow, Hip, Arterial, Venous
Based on the above document, select the appropriate provider from the following list who requested for this document and only return the provider number (eg: 20) nothing else
For the following question if confidence level is more than 85% give the  answer in one word using the format 'True' else 'False'. Does the document has the name of the family doctor?.

Answer only to the following question in two words; and the answer should be in the following format; do not add 'Dr.' to reply. Format : Lastname, Firstname. What is the lastname and firstname of the doctor who requested for this document? Answer Format (Lastname, Firstname)

Answer only to the following question in two words; and the answer should be in the following format; do not add 'Dr.' to reply. Format : Lastname, Firstname. What is the lastname and firstname of the family doctor? Answer Format (Lastname, Firstname)

For the following always use only double quotes instead of single quotes. Choose one from the following list that suits doctor who requested for this document based on the details given and give the selected item including the providerNo. Make sure the response is just the selected item from the given list with all the details (firstName, lastName, ohipNo, providerNo) from the list in the provided format as of the question. Make sure the response is just the selected item, nothing else! Do not add any other text than the result! Response should be in JSON format, not as a string, and property names such as firstName, lastName, ohipNo, providerNo (keys) to be enclosed in double quotes. Make sure the property names are enclosed in double quotes!
